properties.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, NULLIF(c_issued_date,'')::timestamp AS occurred_at, COALESCE(NULLIF(c_redeemed_by,''), '(system)') AS actor, 'voucher' AS entity_type, c_code AS entity_code, COALESCE(c_status,'issued') AS action, 'farmer=' || COALESCE(c_farmer_nid,'?') || ', input=' || COALESCE(c_input_code,'?') || ', qty=' || COALESCE(c_quantity,'?') || ', programme=' || COALESCE(c_programme_code,'?') AS detail FROM app_fd_im_voucher WHERE NULLIF(c_issued_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' UNION ALL SELECT id, NULLIF(c_redemption_date,'')::timestamp AS occurred_at, COALESCE(c_redeemed_by, '(system)') AS actor, 'redemption' AS entity_type, c_code AS entity_code, COALESCE(c_status, 'completed') AS action, 'voucher=' || COALESCE(c_voucher_code,'?') || ', point=' || COALESCE(c_redemption_point,'?') || ', qty=' || COALESCE(c_quantity_redeemed,'?') AS detail FROM app_fd_im_voucher_redemption WHERE NULLIF(c_redemption_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' UNION ALL SELECT id, NULLIF(c_distribution_date,'')::timestamp AS occurred_at, COALESCE(c_operator_name, '(unknown)') AS actor, 'distribution' AS entity_type, c_code AS entity_code, 'signed' AS action, 'voucher=' || COALESCE(c_voucher_code,'?') || COALESCE(', witness=' || NULLIF(c_witness_name,''),'') AS detail FROM app_fd_im_distribution WHERE NULLIF(c_distribution_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' UNION ALL SELECT id, NULLIF(c_txn_date,'')::timestamp AS occurred_at, COALESCE(c_performed_by, '(unknown)') AS actor, 'stock_txn' AS entity_type, c_code AS entity_code, c_txn_type AS action, 'point=' || COALESCE(c_point_code,'?') || COALESCE(', supplier=' || NULLIF(c_supplier_code,''), '') || COALESCE(', invoice=' || NULLIF(c_supplier_invoice_no,''), '') AS detail FROM app_fd_im_stock_txn WHERE NULLIF(c_txn_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days') merged ORDER BY occurred_at DESC NULLS LAST
properties.countSql: SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_im_voucher WHERE NULLIF(c_issued_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days') + (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_im_voucher_redemption WHERE NULLIF(c_redemption_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days') + (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_im_distribution WHERE NULLIF(c_distribution_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days') + (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_im_stock_txn WHERE NULLIF(c_txn_date,'')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days')
